# @babel/plugin-transform-react-jsx-self > Add a __self prop to all JSX Elements See our website [@babel/plugin-transform-react-jsx-self](https://babeljs.io/docs/babel-plugin-transform-react-jsx-self) for more information. ## Install Using npm: ```sh npm install --save-dev @babel/plugin-transform-react-jsx-self ``` or using yarn: ```sh yarn add @babel/plugin-transform-react-jsx-self --dev ```
